newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9, 2026. The most recent corporate events - Q1 2026 results with a raised FY adjusted-EPS outlook ($6.65-6.85) and 14% Aerospace backlog growth - were reported April 27, well before the window. The +7.5% move since June 9 is industrial-sector drift with no new AI-chain datapoint.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-AI lens needs an AI-chain-relevant catalyst; there is none since June 9. The aerospace/flow cross-pollination thesis is speculative and unchanged; +7.5% is sub-threshold industrial drift, so hold with no fundamental delta.
verdicts.bull: High-reliability sensing/fluid/valve tech could migrate into datacenter cooling/control niches.
verdicts.neutral: Solid industrial with raised guide but only tangential, speculative AI linkage.
verdicts.bear: No direct AI-node exposure; inclusion rests on cross-pollination that hasn't materialized.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis stays speculative; no AI catalyst
